testcase.name: submitComplaint_nullAttachment_noPath

error.message:
Mockito cannot mock this class: class com.compass.util.RemoteReportingClient.
If you're not sure why you're getting this error, please open an issue on GitHub.
Java : 25 JVM vendor name : BellSoft JVM vendor version : 25+37-LTS JVM name : OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM JVM version : 25+37-LTS JVM info : mixed mode OS name : Windows 11 OS version : 10.0
You are seeing this disclaimer because Mockito is configured to create inlined mocks. You can learn about inline mocks and their limitations under item #39 of the Mockito class javadoc.
Underlying exception : org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: Could not modify all classes [class java.lang.Object, class com.compass.util.RemoteReportingClient]

testcase.name: resolveComplaint_setsStatusAndTimestamp

error.message:
Mockito cannot mock this class: class com.compass.util.RemoteReportingClient.
If you're not sure why you're getting this error, please open an issue on GitHub.
Java : 25 JVM vendor name : BellSoft JVM vendor version : 25+37-LTS JVM name : OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM JVM version : 25+37-LTS JVM info : mixed mode OS name : Windows 11 OS version : 10.0
You are seeing this disclaimer because Mockito is configured to create inlined mocks. You can learn about inline mocks and their limitations under item #39 of the Mockito class javadoc.
Underlying exception : org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: Could not modify all classes [class java.lang.Object, class com.compass.util.RemoteReportingClient]

testcase.error:
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException:
Mockito cannot mock this class: class com.compass.util.RemoteReportingClient.
If you're not sure why you're getting this error, please open an issue on GitHub.
Java : 25 JVM vendor name : BellSoft JVM vendor version : 25+37-LTS JVM name : OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM JVM version : 25+37-LTS JVM info : mixed mode OS name : Windows 11 OS version : 10.0
You are seeing this disclaimer because Mockito is configured to create inlined mocks. You can learn about inline mocks and their limitations under item #39 of the Mockito class javadoc.
Underlying exception : org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: Could not modify all classes [class java.lang.Object, class com.compass.util.RemoteReportingClient] at org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension.beforeEach(MockitoExtension.java:160) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) Suppressed: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "java.util.Set.forEach(java.util.function.Consumer)" because the return value of "org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtensionContext$Store.remove(Object, java.lang.Class)" is null at org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension.afterEach(MockitoExtension.java:194) ... 2 more Caused by: org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: Could not modify all classes [class java.lang.Object, class com.compass.util.RemoteReportingClient] at net.bytebuddy.TypeCache.findOrInsert(TypeCache.java:168) at net.bytebuddy.TypeCache$WithInlineExpunction.findOrInsert(TypeCache.java:399) at net.bytebuddy.TypeCache.findOrInsert(TypeCache.java:190) at net.bytebuddy.TypeCache$WithInlineExpunction.findOrInsert(TypeCache.java:410) ... 3 more Caused by: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Byte Buddy could not instrument all classes within the mock's type hierarchy
This problem should never occur for javac-compiled classes. This problem has been observed for classes that are: - Compiled by older versions of scalac - Classes that are part of the Android distribution at
